title: Shari Stack
compiled_truth: Shari Stack is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-10-17), Shari Stack sent 137 and received 1150 emails, totalling 1287 interactions. Top correspondents: [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (66), [Rhonda Denton](people/rhonda-denton) (44), [Leslie Hansen](people/leslie-hansen) (44), [Elizabeth Sager](people/elizabeth-sager) (29), [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (29). Mailbox folders observed: notes_inbox, online_trading.
